results.rendered_html:
kirīṭin a. [kirīṭa-ini] Wearing a crown or diadem;  Bg. 11. 17 , 46 ;  Pt. 3. 
— m. N. of Arjuna;  Bg. 11. 35.  ( Mb.  thus accounts for the name: -purā śakreṇa me baddhaṃ yudhyato dānavarṣabhaiḥ . kirīṭaṃ mūrdhni sūryābhaṃ tenāhurmāṃ kirīṭinaṃ ..).
